ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is female */,
  "minority" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student belongs to a minority group */,
  "mom_ed" INTEGER /* Educational level of the student's mother */,
  "dad_ed" INTEGER /* Educational level of the student's father */,
  "ses_cont" REAL /* Socio-economic status continuous measure */,
  "read_pre" REAL /* Reading score prior to the treatment */,
  "math_pre" REAL /* Mathematics score prior to the treatment */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the program */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the student left the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, graduated, dropped out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_female FOREIGN KEY ("female") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_minority FOREIGN KEY ("minority") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_ses_cont FOREIGN KEY ("ses_cont") REFERENCES socio_economic_status ("ses_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_dad_ed FOREIGN KEY ("dad_ed") REFERENCES parent_education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_mom_ed FOREIGN KEY ("mom_ed") REFERENCES parent_education_levels ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., educational program, intervention) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider or organization offering the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_treatments" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "trt_rand" INTEGER /* Indicates if the treatment was randomized */,
  "trt_non_rand" INTEGER /* Indicates if the treatment was non-randomized */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the student's treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the student's treatment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment (e.g., ongoing, completed, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Reading score */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the score was taken */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., standardized, formative) */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who administered the test */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class in which the test was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "math_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Mathematics score */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the score was taken */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., standardized, formative) */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who administered the test */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class in which the test was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_math_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "year_completed" INTEGER /* Year the parent completed their education */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the parent completed their education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic factor */,
  "demographic_type" TEXT /* Type of demographic factor (e.g., gender, minority status) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic factor */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "first_language" TEXT /* First language spoken by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socio_economic_status" (
  "ses_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socio-economic status measure */,
  "ses_cont" REAL /* Continuous measure of socio-economic status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the socio-economic status measure */,
  "income_level" REAL /* Income level of the student's household */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the student's parents */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status (e.g., owned, rented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ses_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., academic, behavioral) */,
  "outcome_measure" REAL /* Quantitative measure of the outcome */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who recorded the outcome */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class in which the outcome was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Key terms or topics covered in the report */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the report */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES program_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, edit, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the permission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the permission */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., all programs, specific program) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
